message:
fix(analysis,tui,wizard): fix markdown pipe escaping, null timestamp sort, track ID gaps, and scroll bleeding

- brief.rs: escape pipe characters in markdown table titles to prevent
  table corruption when titles contain |
- history.rs: fix event sorting to handle null timestamps (sort after
  timestamped events instead of crashing)
- plan.rs: fix track ID generation to be contiguous by skipping
  components with no actionable items
- pages_wizard.rs: trim whitespace from GitHub/Cloudflare config
  inputs before validation
- tui.rs: reset detail scroll offset when entering/exiting/navigating
  actionable mode to prevent scroll position bleeding across views
- Add comprehensive tests for all fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
